dom.summary: Fixed header containing logo, nav links, and CTA button. Collapses to hamburger below 768px.

header.site-nav.transition: height 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease

states.name: scrolled
states.transition: height 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease
states.implementation: Add scroll event listener; toggle class 'scrolled' at 60px threshold. Class drives CSS transitions.

states.name: mobile-open
states.implementation: Toggle aria-expanded on button; toggle class 'nav-open' on header. CSS transitions on mobile drawer.

assets.purpose: Site wordmark displayed in nav header left

responsive.desktop: Full horizontal nav bar; logo left, links center, CTA right. Height 72px default, 56px scrolled.
responsive.tablet: Logo left, links hidden, hamburger right at 768px. Drawer slides down on open.
responsive.mobile: Same as tablet. Drawer full-width stacked links at 390px.
